zh.title: 艾达币/美元技术分析：震荡偏弱反弹承压
zh.content:
当前价格在0.174附近，短线贴近日内高点，但仍低于SMA20均线，整体结构偏弱中带反弹，属于下跌后的技术性修复行情

MACD维持轻微负值，动能柱未转正，说明多头力量不足，缺乏持续上攻动能，市场仍以震荡整理为主

下方支撑关注0.1725及0.170整数区，上方阻力在0.1768均线以及0.18关口，突破与否决定短期方向

操作上建议以区间思路为主，未站稳SMA20前避免追多，可在阻力附近分批减仓，跌破支撑需止损观望

en.title: Cardano vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
ADA/USD is showing a mild intraday recovery, with price holding near 0.1747 after rebounding from the 0.1725 low. Despite this bounce, the broader structure still leans slightly bearish as price remains below the 20-period SMA at 0.1769. This positioning suggests sellers still control the upper hand, while buyers are attempting to stabilize momentum within a narrow consolidation zone.

Momentum indicators reinforce this cautious outlook. The MACD is still negative at -0.0015, indicating that downside pressure has not fully faded. Although bearish momentum appears to be weakening, there is no confirmed reversal signal yet. Without RSI data, confirmation is limited, but trading below the SMA continues to signal a neutral-to-bearish bias in short-term conditions.

Key support is established at 0.1725, which aligns with the recent swing low and serves as the immediate defense zone for buyers. A breakdown below this level could expose 0.1700 as the next psychological support area. On the upside, resistance is clearly defined at 0.1768, closely aligned with the SMA20, followed by 0.1800 where previous supply has capped advances.

In the near term, range-bound strategies remain more effective, with price oscillating between 0.1725 support and 0.1768 resistance. A decisive breakout above the SMA20 would improve structure and open potential upside toward 0.1800. Until then, traders may favor controlled entries near range extremes while maintaining tight risk management due to compressed volatility.
